skills.name: Ai Solution Architect
skills.description: Design an AI system architecture: model selection, inference pipeline, context management, evaluation strategy, and cost/latency trade-offs.

skills.name: Context Engineering
skills.description: Design context assembly strategy: what information enters the model context, in what order, with what budget, and how to handle overflow.

skills.name: Prompt Engineer
skills.description: Design production-grade prompts: system instructions, task templates, variable slots, few-shot examples, and output format contracts.

skills.name: Prompt Optimizer
skills.description: Optimize prompts for token efficiency, latency, and output quality while preserving task behavior.

skills.name: Prompt Reviewer
skills.description: Review prompts against quality, safety, and reliability criteria; produce findings with severity and fix recommendations.

skills.name: Adr Generator
skills.description: Create Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for significant technical decisions using the Michael Nygard format with structured context, options, and consequences.

skills.name: Api Designer
skills.description: Design REST or event-based APIs from container architecture: resources, operations, schemas, error model, and versioning strategy.

skills.name: Architecture Review
skills.description: Conduct a structured architecture review against requirements, quality attributes, and best practices; produce findings with severity and remediation recommendations.

skills.name: Component Diagram Builder
skills.description: Produce a C4 Level 3 (Component) diagram for a selected container, showing internal components, responsibilities, and dependencies.

skills.name: Container Diagram Builder
skills.description: Produce a C4 Level 2 (Container) diagram decomposing the system into deployable/runnable units with technology choices and communication paths.

skills.name: Data Flow Analyzer
skills.description: Analyze and document data flows across the system: data origins, transformations, storage, retention, and compliance boundaries.

skills.name: Integration Planner
skills.description: Plan integrations between system containers and external systems: patterns, contracts, sequencing, failure handling, and monitoring.

skills.name: Scalability Advisor
skills.description: Assess system scalability: identify bottlenecks, recommend scaling strategies per container, and define capacity planning guidelines.

skills.name: Solution Architecture
skills.description: Design a solution architecture from PRD and constraints: identify components, integration patterns, technology options, and quality attribute trade-offs.

skills.name: System Context Builder
skills.description: Produce a C4 Level 1 (System Context) diagram and description showing the system, its users, and external dependencies.

skills.name: Acceptance Criteria Generator
skills.description: Write testable acceptance criteria for user stories using Given-When-Then (BDD) format with edge cases and negative scenarios.

skills.name: Epic Generator
skills.description: Decompose a PRD or feature scope into well-structured epics with goals, scope boundaries, and story count estimates.

skills.name: Feature Prioritization
skills.description: Prioritize a feature backlog using a structured scoring framework (RICE by default) and produce a ranked list with rationale.

skills.name: Idea Validator
skills.description: Validate a product idea by mapping assumptions, assessing desirability/feasibility/viability signals, and producing a go/no-go/pivot recommendation with evidence gaps.

skills.name: Okr Builder
skills.description: Create aligned Objectives and Key Results (OKRs) for product teams with measurable key results and initiative mapping.

skills.name: Persona Generator
skills.description: Create evidence-based user personas focused on behaviors, goals, and pain points — not demographics alone.

skills.name: Prd Generator
skills.description: Produce a Product Requirements Document (PRD) for a defined feature or MVP scope with goals, requirements, and success metrics.

skills.name: Problem Statement Builder
skills.description: Transform a raw problem hypothesis into a structured, testable Problem Statement using Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) framing.

skills.name: Product Discovery Assistant
skills.description: Facilitate structured product discovery using Opportunity Solution Tree (OST) and Teresa Torres framework: map outcomes, opportunities, solutions, and experiments.

skills.name: Product Vision Builder
skills.description: Define a product vision that connects user problems, strategic direction, and measurable north star using the Product Vision Canvas.

skills.name: Sprint Planner
skills.description: Plan a development sprint: select stories, define sprint goal, estimate capacity, and produce a sprint backlog with risk buffer.

skills.name: Story Mapping
skills.description: Create a visual story map (Jeff Patton method) organizing user activities, tasks, and stories across a horizontal user journey with vertical priority.

skills.name: User Story Generator
skills.description: Generate INVEST-compliant user stories from epics or requirements with clear value statements and story point guidance.

skills.name: Chunking Strategy Advisor
skills.description: Recommend document chunking strategy: chunk size, overlap, boundaries, and metadata preservation for optimal retrieval quality.

skills.name: Embedding Strategy Advisor
skills.description: Select and configure embedding models and indexing strategy for a RAG corpus based on domain, language, and quality requirements.

skills.name: Hybrid Search Advisor
skills.description: Design hybrid search strategy combining dense vector retrieval and sparse keyword search (BM25) with fusion ranking.

skills.name: Rag Architecture Designer
skills.description: Design a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline architecture: ingestion, indexing, retrieval, generation, and evaluation components.

skills.name: Retriever Optimizer
skills.description: Optimize RAG retrieval quality: tune top-k, reranking, query preprocessing, and filtering to maximize recall and precision.
